compiled_state.author: Iso Tester

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: S1 pre-pin record (AC: record inherited submit type BEFORE the [submit] pin lands). Queried the running Gerrit 3.14.1 REST /a/projects/rebar/config on 2026-07-02: effective submit_type = MERGE_IF_NECESSARY (submit_type_record = null => inherited from All-Projects, not locally configured); use_content_merge configured_value = INHERIT, inherited_value = true; match_author_to_committer_date inherited = false. So the [submit] pin (action = merge if necessary + mergeContent = true) makes the CURRENT effective behaviour explicit/stable — it does not change merge semantics, only removes the dependency on the inherited default. Back-out target: remove the [submit] block to restore INHERIT (which currently resolves to MERGE_IF_NECESSARY + content-merge true).

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body:
Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 8 advisory). Triage — all 8 valid, remediation plan:
1. [T3] setup-project.sh only RESOLVES group UUIDs, doesn't CREATE — will add idempotent create-group (SSH create-group / REST PUT /a/groups) before the ls-groups resolution.
2. [E5] Add a LIVE submit test: push a test change and submit it via merge-if-necessary to prove the pinned strategy actually merges (not just that config parsed).
3. [E1] 'three ACLs' = three permission TYPES (Create Reference, Delete Reference, Push Merge Commit); Push Merge Commit is applied to two ref-patterns (refs/for/refs/heads/main + refs/for/refs/heads/feature/*). Will state this explicitly so the count is unambiguous.
4. [G1G2] Update the stale hardcoded commit message at setup-project.sh:82.
5. [T5b] ACL enforcement is Gerrit-NATIVE (server rejects the push/ref-op and records it in Gerrit's sshd/httpd audit log) — the bot is not in that path, so a rebar metric is not warranted; will document 'signals to watch' (Gerrit audit log) in the runbook (S4) instead. Justified light-touch.
6. [T1] Pre-flight/post-flight: after pushing config, read the label back via REST and ASSERT copyCondition contains MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE (Gerrit drops/normalizes unknown predicates) — catches a version-gated/mis-spelled token immediately, not at S5.
7. [E6/F1] Quiet-window proof: query /a/changes/?q=status:open+project:rebar+branch:main and confirm empty BEFORE applying the [submit] pin.
8. [T9] Document the group RETIRE path (revoke ACLs + delete/empty the group) in the amending ADR back-out section (dovetails with S6 back-out).

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body:
S1 LIVE VERIFICATION COMPLETE (against running Gerrit 3.14.1, 2026-07-02). All ACs met:

AC1 (copyCondition applied + accepted): pushed project.config to refs/meta/config (16f8240, then f8bd6ac). Read-back via REST GET /projects/rebar/labels/LLM-Review -> copy_condition = 'changekind:NO_CODE_CHANGE OR changekind:MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE' (Gerrit ACCEPTED the token; T1 resolved — no silent drop). Verified label copy_condition = 'changekind:NO_CODE_CHANGE' (deliberate divergence: LLM-Review carries on re-merge, Verified re-runs).

AC2 (submit type recorded before pin; pin in quiet window): pre-pin record captured earlier (MERGE_IF_NECESSARY inherited). Quiet window established by abandoning 3 stale e2e probes (162/62/61) -> 0 open changes on main before push. Post-pin: use_content_merge configured_value flipped INHERIT->TRUE (proves [submit] block landed); submit_type = MERGE_IF_NECESSARY.

AC3 (group exists w/ ACLs; setup-project.sh idempotent): created feature-branch-drivers group (UUID 3fe3138810fb101edd4e3b6b26fb4b9318d7f120; members=[JoeOakhartNava], includes=[Administrators]). setup-project.sh extended to create+converge the group; ran it live (registered a temp SSH key, since removed): DRY_RUN reported 'group already exists' + 'refs/meta/config already up to date (no-op)' == idempotent convergence proven.

AC4/AC5 (ADR + docs): ADR docs/adr/0025-feature-branch-merge-carry.md (amends 0013, 0020) — merge-carry rationale, Verified/LLM-Review divergence, membership policy, copyCondition back-out + group RETIRE path. docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md gained section 6a.

AC6 (LIVE negative checks):
- feature/* creation by non-member (rebar-review-bot, Service Users, not in group): PUT branch -> HTTP 403 'not permitted: create on refs/heads/feature/...'. Member (JoeOakhartNava) -> 201 created. 
- merge push by non-member: first attempt exposed that All-Projects grants pushMerge on refs/for/* to Registered Users, so the additive rule did NOT restrict. FIX: added exclusiveGroupPermissions=pushMerge on both refs/for/refs/heads/{main,feature/*} (overrides inherited grant). Re-test: bot merge push -> 'you are not allowed to upload merges' (REFUSED); member merge push -> SUCCESS. 

E5 (submit-strategy actually merges, not just parses): change 184 -> admin-voted LLM-Review+1 & Verified+1 -> submittable -> submitted -> status MERGED via merge-if-necessary. 

Cleanup: all test changes abandoned; test branches deleted; temp SSH key removed; 0 leftover artifacts.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: S1 code pushed to Gerrit for review as change 185 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/185), Change-Id I1d6ed8e3, single commit on origin/main. Awaiting LLM-Review (bot) + Verified (CI) votes to land.

compiled_state.description:
## Why
Epic 88ab (elfish-chair-lug) S1. The feature-branch pattern needs Gerrit-side changes: vote-carry for re-merges after main advances (MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE), an explicitly pinned submit type (currently unset/inherited — FF-only or cherry-pick would defeat atomic merge-back), and a bounded write path for merge commits + feature branches.

## What
- `infra/gerrit/project.config`: LLM-Review `copyCondition = changekind:NO_CODE_CHANGE OR changekind:MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE`; Verified copyCondition UNCHANGED (re-run posture — rationale in the ADR).
- Record the CURRENT effective inherited submit type (ssh/REST query, noted on this ticket) BEFORE pinning `[submit] action = merge if necessary` + `mergeContent = true`; apply in a quiet window (no open changes targeting main).
- ACLs: `Create Reference` + `Delete Reference` on `refs/heads/feature/*`; `Push Merge Commit` on `refs/for/refs/heads/main` + `refs/for/refs/heads/feature/*`; ALL bound to a new named group `feature-branch-drivers`.
- `infra/gerrit/setup-project.sh`: extend the managed-groups `want` dict (~line 57, currently Administrators + Service Users only) so the group is created/resolved declaratively and idempotently.
- ADR amending ADR-0013 (+ the 1fa8 Verified ADR): merge-change gate design, label-divergence rationale, group membership policy.
- `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md` gate/ACL sections.

Inherited plan-review findings (run 3): membership policy must be constrained in the ADR — initial members = repo admins + named operating agents; changes via admin-approved setup-project.sh edit (f8e6233f). Back-out wording: "no label/gate changes REQUIRED" — the copyCondition addition is inert absent merge changes (MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE cannot match a non-merge patchset) and may be left or reverted (f51eb171/f90d5449).

## Scope
Gerrit config + setup script + ADR + setup docs only. No bot code (S2), no CI/g2p (S3), no contributor docs (S4).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] copyCondition change applied declaratively (refs/meta/config) and accepted by the running Gerrit 3.14.1
- [ ] Current inherited submit type recorded on this ticket BEFORE the [submit] pin lands; pin applied in a quiet window
- [ ] `feature-branch-drivers` group exists holding exactly the three ACLs; `setup-project.sh` converges it idempotently on re-run
- [ ] ADR merged: gate design, Verified/LLM-Review divergence rationale, membership policy (initial members + change process), copyCondition back-out note
- [ ] `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md` updated
- [ ] Live negative checks: merge push by a non-member is refused; feature/* branch creation outside the group is refused

file_impact.reason: copyCondition MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE, [submit] pin, feature-branch ACLs + exclusiveGroupPermissions
create+converge feature-branch-drivers group; want dict; commit msg + header
